title: Shards of the End : Fragments of Power
description: A RPG Fantasy experience in the style of Minecraft!
body:
# Shards of the End – Fragments of Power
### A Minecraft RPG Modpack
### I recommend to play this Modpack together with as many friend as possible!

*In the wake of the Ender Dragon’s fall, the realm did not heal… it evolved.*

Mysterious shards, infused with ancient Ender magic, have scattered across every dimension. Whoever gathers them can bend reality itself — but the shards are fiercely guarded by creatures twisted by the void.

With **End Upgrade** woven into the world, the End has grown richer, stranger, and far more dangerous. New biomes, resources, and secrets wait beyond the obsidian gateway, challenging even the bravest adventurers.

And for those born different, **Origins** shapes your destiny: choose or discover your innate powers — some gifted by the End itself — and rise (or fall) with unique abilities and burdens.

Forge your path through dangerous dungeons, forgotten ruins, and perilous skies. Master powerful gear, uncover hidden enchantments, and piece together the truth behind the Dragon’s legacy.

**Will you wield the Fragments of Power… or will they consume you?**
